subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-10-13 ? in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: When we first came to ‘Akka, we behaved in such wise that everyone trusted us. There was a certain Qasim of Nayriz who was very weak.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرات اطمینان دارند اوایل که ما آمدیم بعکا وارد شدیم کاری کرده بودیم که همه اطمینان
